site.name: GeoScore
site.tagline: Free GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) audit tool
site.description: GeoScore is a free, open-source tool that scores any website 0-100 across 12 dimensions of AI search visibility. It audits your site for AI crawler access (robots.txt), machine-readable content (llms.txt, JSON-LD schema), and authority signals (E-E-A-T), then generates fix files you can deploy immediately. Used by developers, SEO specialists, and content teams to diagnose why some sites get cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude while others don't.
site.audience: Web developers, SEO professionals, content marketers, SaaS founders, publishers

what_we_offer.name: GEO Audit
what_we_offer.description: Score any URL 0-100 across 12 dimensions of AI search readiness

what_we_offer.name: llms.txt Checker
what_we_offer.description: Verify your site has the AI guidance file that helps ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity understand your content

what_we_offer.name: Robots.txt AI Checker
what_we_offer.description: Verify your robots.txt isn't blocking GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, and other AI crawlers

what_we_offer.name: AI Readiness Score
what_we_offer.description: Get a 0-100 score across 12 dimensions of AI search visibility with actionable fixes
